context: section-4 IP4.A2 / S2.A5 acceptance: auto-start-after-5-minutes is described as a Cloud Function/scheduled task. In client-dealer mode (no Cloud Functions deployed), the equivalent is run by the first-joined-client on a setTimeout when serverEngineMode === 'client-dealer'.
what_spec_said: A Cloud Function or scheduled task transitions the tournament to 'in_progress' 5 minutes after first-join if minimum threshold is met.
what_was_done: Both: functions/src/lobbyTimers.js implements the Cloud Function (deploy-when-ready). Additionally, src/lobby.js sets up a client-side setTimeout on first-join when serverEngineMode==='client-dealer' that writes the same state transition. Both paths target the same Firestore field (/tournaments/{tid}.status).
rationale: Mirror of dev-001's overall pattern. The IP4.A2 assertion uses target_module 'functions/src/lobbyTimers.js' which IS present (Cloud Function ships ready); the client-side mirror is documented but not the verification target.
nested_equivalent: Under nested dispatch, this would have been described in section-2's Overseer notes alongside the dual-path architecture.
